title: Delete food entries, 7-day progress chart, calorie limit setting, and exceeded limit alert

requirements.summary: Add delete button to each food entry card on the Daily Dashboard with immediate summary refresh
acceptanceCriteria: Each food entry in the daily log displays a visible delete/trash icon button
Clicking the delete button removes the entry from the list immediately (optimistic or via query invalidation)
Total calories consumed and net calorie balance update to reflect the deletion without requiring a page reload
The delete button shows a loading/disabled state while the mutation is in flight

file_operations.description: Add a useDeleteFoodEntry mutation hook that calls backend.deleteFoodEntry(id, date) and invalidates dailySummary and foodEntries queries for the given date on success
Add a delete button (Trash icon from lucide-react) to the card that accepts an onDelete callback prop. Show a loading/disabled state on the button while deletion is pending
Wire the useDeleteFoodEntry mutation to each FoodEntryCard by passing an onDelete handler that calls the mutation with the entry's id and date

requirements.summary: Add calorie limit input control with calories remaining display and exceeded limit warning banner on the Daily Dashboard
acceptanceCriteria: A calorie limit input/edit control is visible on the Daily Dashboard, pre-populated with the stored limit for the selected date
Saving a new limit calls setCalorieLimit and immediately refreshes the display
A 'calories remaining' value (limit minus consumed) is shown and updates live as entries are added or deleted
When calories consumed exceed the set limit, a clearly visible warning banner or highlighted indicator appears on the dashboard
The warning disappears when net consumption drops back below the limit

file_operations.description: Add a useCalorieLimit query hook that calls backend.getCalorieLimit(date) and returns the limit as a number. Add a useSetCalorieLimit mutation hook that calls backend.setCalorieLimit(date, limit) and invalidates the calorieLimit query for that date on success

Add a calorie limit section above or near the daily summary that displays an editable input field for the limit (loaded via useCalorieLimit), a save button calling useSetCalorieLimit, and a 'calories remaining' display (limit minus totalCaloriesConsumed). When totalCaloriesConsumed exceeds the limit, render a prominent Alert or banner component (using shadcn/ui Alert with destructive variant) warning the user

requirements.summary: Add a 7-day calorie consumption progress chart to the Daily Dashboard showing daily totals with calorie limit reference line
acceptanceCriteria: A chart is displayed showing calorie consumption for the 7 most recent logged days (or the last 7 calendar days)
Each bar/point accurately reflects the total calories consumed for that date from the backend
A horizontal reference line is drawn at the current day's calorie limit value
The chart updates when food entries are added or deleted without requiring a page reload
Days with no logged data are shown as zero or clearly distinguished

file_operations.description: Add a chart section that fetches daily summaries for the last 7 calendar days (using useSevenDayHistory hook or multiple useDailySummary calls). Render a bar or line chart using Recharts (BarChart or LineChart) showing totalCaloriesConsumed for each day. Include a ReferenceLine component at the current day's calorie limit (from useCalorieLimit). Ensure the chart re-renders when queries are invalidated
